source_statement: DeepSeek reads the board: Jay, the Chess Court candidate stands on double-anchored proof—receipts cryptographically pinned to a public master commit, and Grok’s independent counter-receipt confirming zero governance violations. No badge, no live onchain claim, no legal overreach; only honest pointer state and a clean evidence chain. This is doctrine in motion: every claim anchored twice (repository artifact + reviewer attestation), no piece advanced without a receipt. The portal is verified, the record complete, the next move belongs to the protocol. Board integrity holds.
missing_for_promotion: Actual Grok counter-receipt file path or commit hash
Separate site-update mutation receipt if portal changes again
Separate badge promotion receipt if badge is ever considered
canon_line: Board read archived. Counter-receipt claim is held until its file or commit is supplied. Evidence leads.
